entities.name: NCT04184622
entities.context: SURMOUNT-1 (NCT04184622): Phase 3 interventional study of tirzepatide in participants with obesity or overweight

attributes.descriptive_title: A Study of Tirzepatide (LY3298176) in Participants With Obesity or Overweight

entities.name: tirzepatide
entities.context: Tirzepatide (LY3298176), administered subcutaneously, evaluated for weight reduction in obesity/overweight

entities.name: Obesity
entities.context: Participants with obesity (BMI ≥30 kg/m²) enrolled in SURMOUNT-1

entities.name: Overweight
entities.context: Participants with overweight (BMI ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidities) enrolled in SURMOUNT-1

entities.name: Eli Lilly and Company
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Eli Lilly and Company

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase: PHASE3 — Phase 3 interventional study

entities.name: Placebo arm SC QW
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: matching placebo administered subcutaneously once weekly for 72 weeks (primary period) and up to week 176 for prediabetes participants

entities.name: Tirzepatide 5 mg SC QW
entities.context: Experimental arm: tirzepatide starting at 2.5 mg, escalating to 5 mg QW SC, maintained to week 72

entities.name: Tirzepatide 10 mg SC QW
entities.context: Experimental arm: tirzepatide starting at 2.5 mg, escalating to 10 mg QW SC, maintained to week 72

entities.name: Tirzepatide 15 mg SC QW
entities.context: Experimental arm: tirzepatide starting at 2.5 mg, escalating to 15 mg QW SC, maintained to week 72

entities.name: Arm: Placebo
entities.context: Placebo comparator cohort: SC QW placebo for 72 weeks (primary) and up to week 176 for prediabetes participants

entities.name: Arm: 5 mg Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental cohort receiving tirzepatide 5 mg QW SC

entities.name: Arm: 10 mg Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental cohort receiving tirzepatide 10 mg QW SC

entities.name: Arm: 15 mg Tirzepatide
entities.context: Experimental cohort receiving tirzepatide 15 mg QW SC

entities.name: Adults with obesity or overweight without diabetes
entities.context: Adults ≥18 years with BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidities, without diabetes mellitus, history of unsuccessful dietary weight loss effort

entities.name: percent change from baseline in body weight at week 72
entities.context: Primary endpoint: Percent Change From Baseline in Body Weight at Week 72 (Primary Treatment Period), assessed by MMRM

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥5% body weight reduction at week 72
entities.context: Primary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Who Achieve ≥5% Body Weight Reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥10% body weight reduction at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Who Achieve ≥10% Body Weight Reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥15% body weight reduction at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Who Achieve ≥15% Body Weight Reduction at Week 72

entities.name: percentage of participants achieving ≥20% body weight reduction at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percentage of Participants Who Achieve ≥20% Body Weight Reduction at Week 72

entities.name: change from baseline in waist circumference at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Waist Circumference at Week 72

entities.name: change from baseline in SF-36v2 physical functioning domain score at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in SF-36v2 Acute Form Physical Functioning Domain Score at Week 72 (pooled tirzepatide 10 mg and 15 mg)

entities.name: percent change from baseline in triglycerides at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percent Change From Baseline in Triglycerides at Week 72 (pooled tirzepatide 5 mg, 10 mg, 15 mg)

entities.name: percent change from baseline in total cholesterol at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percent Change From Baseline in Total Cholesterol at Week 72 (pooled tirzepatide 5 mg, 10 mg, 15 mg)

entities.name: percent change from baseline in HDL cholesterol at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Percent Change From Baseline in HDL Cholesterol at Week 72 (pooled tirzepatide 5 mg, 10 mg, 15 mg)

entities.name: change from baseline in systolic blood pressure at week 72
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: Change From Baseline in Systolic Blood Pressure at Week 72 (pooled tirzepatide 5 mg, 10 mg, 15 mg)

entities.name: BMI
entities.context: Inclusion criterion: BMI ≥30 kg/m² or ≥27 kg/m² with comorbidities used for patient selection

entities.name: prediabetes status
entities.context: Prediabetes status at randomization used for stratification and to determine eligibility for extension phase

relations.evidence: Lead Sponsor: Eli Lilly and Company
Phase: PHASE3
SURMOUNT-1 evaluates tirzepatide (LY3298176) in participants with obesity or overweight
Experimental arm: tirzepatide 5 mg QW SC administered in primary and extension treatment periods
Experimental arm: tirzepatide 10 mg QW SC administered in primary and extension treatment periods
Experimental arm: tirzepatide 15 mg QW SC administered in primary and extension treatment periods
Placebo comparator arm: matching placebo SC QW for 72 weeks
SURMOUNT-1 investigates tirzepatide in participants with obesity
SURMOUNT-1 investigates tirzepatide in participants with overweight
Tirzepatide evaluated for treatment of obesity in SURMOUNT-1
Tirzepatide evaluated for treatment of overweight in SURMOUNT-1
